mapper.sql: sdm.id, sdm.distribution_method, sdm.generation_differentiation_flag, sdm.enabled_flag, sdm.create_time, sdm.create_by, sdm.update_time, sdm.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.distribution_method as ${tAlias}_distribution_method, ${tAlias}.generation_differentiation_flag as ${tAlias}_generation_differentiation_flag, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into swm_distribution_method (distribution_method, generation_differentiation_flag, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{distributionMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{generationDifferentiationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update swm_distribution_method set distribution_method = #{distributionMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, generation_differentiation_flag = #{generationDifferentiationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select count(1) from swm_distribution_method sdm where sdm.distribution_method = #{distributionMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and sdm.generation_differentiation_flag = #{generationDifferentiationFlag, jdbcType = BIT}
